overview.description: Agriculture in Vietnam and Southeast Asia is undergoing rapid digital transformation, driven by precision farming, IoT sensors, drone imaging, and AI-powered advisory platforms. The sector faces challenges in yield optimization, pest and disease management, supply chain traceability, and climate adaptation.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$30B agricultural output, agritech segment growing 20%+ YoY
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$400B regional agricultural market with increasing tech adoption

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — sensor data can be high-frequency but farm count is moderate
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Low to medium — fragmented smallholder data, inconsistent collection

painPoints.problem: Crop disease detection is manual and delayed, leading to yield loss
Demand forecasting for perishable produce is inaccurate, causing waste
Fragmented supply chain with poor traceability from farm to market

relatedNodes.description: Agricultural products flow into logistics and supply chain networks.
Computer vision enables crop monitoring and disease detection.
